changes_made.description: Remove unused useRef import and containerRef variable (dead code removal)
Replace string literal 'thinking_indicator' with STATUS_REASON.THINKING_INDICATOR constant for consistency with new STATUS_REASON pattern on line 97
Clarify isAllowedSpecialKey JSDoc to explain naming relationship with NAVIGATION_KEY_VALUES and special-keys API

commits: 0b4f8e5: refactor(opencode): clean up Issue #473 TUI navigation code
notes: Three minor improvements applied: (1) dead code removal in NavigationButtons.tsx (unused useRef/containerRef), (2) consistency improvement in current-output/route.ts replacing string literal with STATUS_REASON constant to match the pattern used by Issue #473 additions, (3) JSDoc clarification for isAllowedSpecialKey naming. All 4900 tests pass, TypeScript 0 errors, ESLint 0 errors. Broader STATUS_REASON constant migration for pre-existing string literals (prompt_detected, input_prompt, etc.) was intentionally deferred as it would affect 30+ test assertions outside the scope of Issue #473.
